data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. TREASURE HUNTER loomed to win but ran out of condition when fresh from a spell over 1000m at the Sapphire Coast last time out. Will take a lot from that run and less pressure over this longer trip is to his advantage. Can improve enough to take this out. 4. COSSACK WARRIOR led for home under siege but really gave his all only to be edged out on the line over 1300m at Goulburn recently. In great form and his record at this trip reads well. Sure to be prominent for a long way. Front-runner 7. CAYMAN ISLAND comes back in trip today after being pegged back late in his last couple, both over 1600m. Might have to work a bit from the wide draw which is the only concern. 2. TRANSPORTER steps out for a new stable and has plenty of upside.","runners":[8,4,7,2],"exclusive":false}
